pr.title: Medusa: Unstable — DeltaNet Crawler 0.8104 BPB 10mb file size(best seed), mean 0.9984, Frugendorff continuation

output.summary: Medusa adds 4-head DeltaNet chunk_delta_rule inside the Frugendorff crawler with loop-aware GPTQ and late-start EMA to tame quantized state updates.
techniques: DeltaNet chunk_delta_rule states within 4-loop Frugendorff crawler
Loop-aware two-phase GPTQ calibration for int6+zstd quantization
Late-start EMA reinitialization at warmdown onset
